description_long: This object is a pair of metal scissors with two elongated, sharp blades joined at a central pivot. The handles are circular with one handle featuring an additional protruding tang for finger support, suggesting ergonomic design for precision use. The blades are straight and taper to fine, pointed tips, suitable for detailed cutting tasks. The surface appears metallic and smooth, with a consistent gray coloration throughout. The pivot joint is visible and likely secured with a screw or rivet, allowing the blades to open and close smoothly. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, giving the scissors a utilitarian and professional appearance.
description: A metallic pair of scissors with pointed blades and ergonomic, circular handles, finished in a smooth gray surface. The design is utilitarian and suitable for precise cutting tasks.
description_view_0: The scissors are seen from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the sharp, pointed blades and the circular handles, with the finger tang visible.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the length of the blades and the alignment of the handles, showing the smooth transition from handle to blade.
description_view_2: The handles are more prominent in this view, with the finger tang and the circular loops clearly visible, and the blades receding into the background.
description_view_3: The scissors are shown from the opposite side, displaying the symmetry of the handles and the full length of the blades.
attribute_handle_type: Asymmetrical, ergonomic handles with one handle featuring a protruding tang for finger support; not padded or coated.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central screw or rivet pivot joint; not adjustable.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two circular finger loops, one slightly larger and with a tang; no soft inserts or texturing, designed for thumb and finger.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips for precision cutting.
